# Assessment Facts Overview

This overview links to supplementary analysis documents generated for report report-20260520063056.

## Available Documents

- [Architecture Diagram](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level and component-level application architecture views.
- [Dependency Map](./dependency-map.md) - External dependency inventory grouped by functional category.
- [API & Service Communication Contracts](./api-service-contracts.md) - Endpoint and service communication contract summary.
- [Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](./data-architecture.md) - Database, entity, repository, and data-boundary analysis.

- [Core Business Workflows](./business-workflows.md) - Primary domain workflows and decision logic documentation.
